content: This document is a letter of internship, offering an unpaid internship position to the recipient, Kausik Varma, at PreciStat IT Solutions Pvt Ltd.
The document is an offer for an unpaid internship position to Kausik Varma at PreciStat IT Solutions Pvt Ltd.
Which domain is this related to?
This document is related to the Education or Training domain, specifically an internship opportunity in the field of Information Technology.
